problem_text_cn: 1426 已知大气中$^{14}\text{C}/^{12}\text{C}$浓度比$\eta = 1.2 \times 10^{-12}$，$^{14}\text{C}$半衰期$T_{1/2} = 5730$年。(1) 计算大气中碳的比放射性（1克碳每分钟的衰变次数）；(2) 古生物样品中$^{14}\text{C}$含量为活生物的$1/1.831$，估算其年代；(3) 为使测量统计误差$\delta = 1\%$，需多少克古生物样品（1小时计数）？并估算年代精度。
problem_text_en: 1426 Given $^{14}\text{C}/^{12}\text{C}$ ratio $\eta = 1.2 \times 10^{-12}$ in atmosphere, $T_{1/2}(^{14}\text{C}) = 5730$ y. (1) Calculate specific radioactivity of carbon (decays per gram per minute); (2) Ancient sample has $^{14}\text{C}$ content $1/1.831$ of living matter, estimate its age; (3) For statistical error $\delta = 1\%$, what mass of sample is needed for 1-hour counting? Estimate age precision.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】(1) 比放射性$A' = \lambda N(^{14}\text{C}) = \lambda \cdot \eta \cdot \frac{N_A}{12}$；(2) 年代$t = \frac{1}{\lambda}\ln\frac{A(0)}{A(t)}$；(3) $\delta = 1/\sqrt{N} \Rightarrow N = 10^4$，由$14 \times 60 \times m / 1.831 = 10^4$得$m$，年代误差$\Delta t = \frac{1}{\lambda}\frac{\Delta A}{A}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) Specific activity $A' = \lambda N(^{14}\text{C}) = \lambda \cdot \eta \cdot \frac{N_A}{12}$; (2) Age $t = \frac{1}{\lambda}\ln\frac{A(0)}{A(t)}$; (3) $\delta = 1/\sqrt{N} \Rightarrow N = 10^4$, solve $14 \times 60 \times m / 1.831 = 10^4$ for $m$, age error $\Delta t = \frac{1}{\lambda}\frac{\Delta A}{A}$.
problem_answer: (1) 比放射性$\boldsymbol{14}$次/(克·分)；(2) 古生物年代约$\boldsymbol{5000}$年；(3) 需样品$\boldsymbol{22}$克，年代精度约$\boldsymbol{\pm 83}$年。
